actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / Burnside neutral irreducibility attempt blocked by non-full current generator algebra

current_source_only_generators.missing_generator: same-surface off-diagonal source/orthogonal neutral transfer or row coupling

future_mixed_generator_example.interpretation: This is an acceptance-shape example only.  It is not a PR230 measurement or theorem until the off-diagonal generator is derived on the same surface.

conditional_surface_status: conditional-support if a future same-surface neutral generator set generates the full matrix algebra or a primitive positive transfer power, with certified source and canonical-Higgs overlaps
exact_next_action: To make the neutral Burnside route positive, supply a same-surface neutral scalar generator set with source/orthogonal mixing and prove that its generated algebra is full M_n, or supply an equivalent primitive-cone certificate.  Otherwise return to certified O_H/C_sH/C_HH rows, W/Z response rows, Schur A/B/C rows, or strict scalar-LSZ moment/threshold/FV authority.

future_certificate_contract.required: explicit PR230 neutral scalar generator set after gauge, fermion, scalar-source, and canonical-Higgs construction
Burnside certificate that the generated algebra is M_n or the commutant is scalar-only
equivalent nonnegative transfer matrix with a positive finite power on the same neutral cone
nonzero certified source and canonical-Higgs overlaps with the unique lowest isolated pole
reject H_unit, Ward, observed selectors, alpha/plaquette/u0, reduced pilots, unit c2/Z_match/kappa_s, and PSLQ selectors

parent_statuses.clean_source_higgs_math_selector: exact support / clean source-Higgs outside-math route selector; positive closure still open
parent_statuses.full_positive_closure_assembly_gate: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed
parent_statuses.invariant_ring_oh_attempt: exact negative boundary / invariant-ring O_H certificate attempt blocked on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.neutral_scalar_commutant_rank_no_go: exact negative boundary / neutral scalar commutant does not force rank-one purity
parent_statuses.neutral_scalar_irreducibility_authority_: exact negative boundary / neutral-scalar irreducibility authority absent on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.neutral_scalar_positivity_improving_dire: exact negative boundary / neutral-scalar positivity-improving direct theorem not derived
parent_statuses.neutral_scalar_primitive_cone_certificat: exact-support / neutral-scalar primitive-cone certificate gate; strict irreducibility certificate absent
parent_statuses.neutral_scalar_primitive_cone_stretch_no: exact negative boundary / neutral-scalar primitive-cone stretch no-go on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.positivity_improving_neutral_scalar_rank: conditional-support / positivity-improving neutral-scalar rank-one theorem; premise absent
parent_statuses.retained_closure_route: open / retained closure not yet reached

proposal_allowed_reason: The current PR230 neutral generator set is block diagonal in a source/orthogonal completion.  Burnside/double-commutant methods therefore do not prove neutral-sector irreducibility until a same-surface off-diagonal generator, primitive transfer matrix, or equivalent non-source row is supplied.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained PR230 closure
does not write a neutral irreducibility or primitive-cone certificate
does not treat source-only C_ss rows as off-diagonal generator data
does not import H_unit, Ward, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, u0, reduced pilots, c2=1, Z_match=1, kappa_s=1, or PSLQ selectors
does not use the future mixed-generator example as PR230 evidence
